description: Existing Django app, user laporkan endpoint /api/projects/ lambat. Bottleneck terindikasi N+1 di related tasks dan owner serializer.
user_message: Our /api/projects/ endpoint in apps/projects/views.py is taking 3-5 seconds for 100 records. Profiling shows N+1 queries on related Task and Owner objects. Fix the N+1 without changing the response shape, and add a regression test that asserts the SQL query count.
notes: Refactor + performance fix. Tests whether refactor prompt activation is sensible for a targeted bug fix. Regression test enforcement is testing rule territory.
